ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* The stock symbol used in the market */,
  "series" TEXT /* The series of the stock (e.g., EQ for equity) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the stock exchange's official website */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Time when the exchange opens */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Time when the exchange closes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_price_data" (
  "price_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day's price data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the price data */,
  "prev_close" REAL /* Previous day's closing price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the day */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last traded price of the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the day */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the day */,
  "total_traded_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity traded during the day */,
  "turnover" REAL /* Total turnover for the day */,
  "no_of_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades during the day */,
  "deliverable_qty" INTEGER /* Deliverable quantity for the day */,
  "percent_dly_qty_to_traded_qty" REAL /* Percentage of deliverable quantity to total traded quantity */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price for the day */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day's closing price */,
  "price_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day's closing price */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* 52-week high price */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* 52-week low price */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_price_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the news is about */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image associated with the news article */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the news item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the market indicator (e.g., Sensex, Nifty) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator on a given date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the indicator value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in the indicator value from the previous day */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the indicator value from the previous day */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the indicator value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)
